data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding scope targeting.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Scope targeting (biz/location/subject)', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or records that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not contain concrete API reads or persisted state checks related to scope targeting, leading to an inconclusive result. Without this critical data, it is impossible to assert whether the requirement is met or if there is a gap.
gaps: No evidence of scope targeting (biz/location/subject) being validated.
